questions.question: What is the name of the jewel necklace that adorns the chest of Krsna?
questions.explanation: The jewel necklace worn by Krsna is known as Taditprabha.

questions.question: Which locket does Krsna wear upon His chest, which contains a beautiful picture of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The locket on Krsna's chest is named Hrdayamodana, and it houses a depiction of Srimati Radharani.

2.129.verse_text: Krsna's jewel is named Kaustubha. In the Kaliya lake the Kaliya serpent's wives gave this jewel to the Lord with their own hands.

questions.question: What is the specific name of the jewel that rests upon the chest of Lord Krsna?
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly identifies the name of the jewel worn by the Lord as Kaustubha.

questions.question: Where did the wives of the Kaliya serpent personally present the Kaustubha jewel to Lord Krsna?
options: On the banks of the Yamuna
questions.explanation: The verse recounts that the wives of the serpent Kaliya gifted the Kaustubha jewel to the Lord while inside the Kaliya lake.

questions.question: Who offered the Kaustubha jewel to Lord Krsna with their own hands?
options: The wives of the Kaliya serpent
questions.correct_answer: The wives of the Kaliya serpent
questions.explanation: The verse states that the wives of the Kaliya serpent presented the jewel to the Lord with their own hands.

2.130.verse_text: Krsna's shark-shaped earrings are named Ratiragadhidaivata, His crown is named Ratnapara and its crest-jewel is named Camaradamari.

questions.question: What is the specific name given to the shark-shaped earrings worn by Lord Krsna?
questions.explanation: Lord Krsna's shark-shaped earrings are specifically identified as Ratiragadhidaivata.

questions.question: What is the name of the crown worn by Lord Krsna?
questions.explanation: The crown worn by Lord Krsna is known as Ratnapara.

questions.question: What is the name of the crest-jewel situated upon Lord Krsna's crown?
questions.explanation: The crest-jewel upon Krsna's crown, Ratnapara, is named Camaradamari.

2.131.verse_text: Krsna's peacock feather crown is named Navaratnavidamba, His gunja necklace is named Ragavalli and His tilaka marking is named Drstimohana.

questions.question: What is the name of the peacock feather crown worn by Lord Krsna?
questions.explanation: Krsna's peacock feather crown is specifically identified as Navaratnavidamba.

questions.question: Which name is given to the gunja necklace that adorns the transcendental form of Lord Krsna?
questions.explanation: The gunja necklace worn by Krsna is known by the name Ragavalli.

questions.question: What is the name of the tilaka marking that graces the forehead of Lord Krsna?
questions.explanation: Krsna's tilaka marking is named Drstimohana.

2.132.verse_text: Krsna's garland of forest flowers and leaves, which reaches down to His feet and contains flowers of five different colors, is called Vaijayanti.

questions.question: What is the name of the forest flower and leaf garland worn by Lord Krsna that reaches down to His feet?
questions.explanation: Lord Krsna's garland made of forest flowers and leaves that extends to His feet is explicitly named Vaijayanti.

questions.question: How many different colors of flowers are contained within Krsna's Vaijayanti garland?
questions.explanation: The Vaijayanti garland decorating Lord Krsna is described as containing flowers of five distinct colors.

questions.question: To what length does Krsna's Vaijayanti garland extend upon His divine form?
questions.explanation: The text describes the Vaijayanti garland as reaching all the way down to Lord Krsna's feet.

2.133.verse_text: The eighth night of the dark moon in the month of Bhadra, when the moon rose together with its dear companion, the star Rohini, is the sacred time decorated by the birth of Lord Krsna in this world.

questions.question: On which specific lunar day and phase of the month of Bhadra did Lord Krsna manifest His birth in this world?
options: The eighth night of the dark moon
The eighth night of the bright moon
The first day of the new moon
questions.correct_answer: The eighth night of the dark moon
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly identifies the eighth night of the dark moon in the month of Bhadra as the time of Lord Krsna's birth.

questions.question: Which star was rising in accompaniment with the moon at the precise moment of Lord Krsna's appearance?
questions.explanation: The verse states that the moon rose together with its dear companion, the star Rohini, during the time of Lord Krsna's birth.

2.134.verse_text: Krsna's Dear Gopis: Now the very wonderful gopis, who are decorated with the good fortune of pure love of God to a greater degree than even Laksmi-devi and the other goddesses of fortune, will be glorified.

questions.question: Which specific group of devotees is described as being decorated with the good fortune of pure love of God even more than Laksmi-devi and the other goddesses of fortune?
questions.explanation: The gopis are explicitly described as possessing a greater degree of the good fortune of pure love of God than Laksmi-devi and other goddesses of fortune.

2.135.verse_text: Srimati Radharani: Among all the beautiful gopis Srimati Radharani is the best. Radharani is the queen of Vrndavana. She has many famous friends, headed by Lalita and Visakha.

questions.question: Who is recognized as the supreme among all the beautiful gopis in Vrndavana?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani is explicitly described as the best among all the beautiful gopis.

questions.question: Which personality is celebrated as the queen of Vrndavana?
questions.explanation: Radharani is identified as the queen of Vrndavana.

questions.question: Which two prominent gopis are named as the heads of Srimati Radharani's famous circle of friends?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani has many famous friends who are headed by Lalita and Visakha.

2.136-139.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's rival is Candravali. Among Candravali's friends are Padma, Syama, Saibya, Bhadra, Vicitra, Gopali, Palika, Candrasalika, Mangala, Vimala, Lila, Taralaksi, Manorama, Kandarpa-manjari, Manjubhasini, Khanjaneksana, Kumuda, Kairavi, Sari, Saradaksi, Visarada, Sankari, Kunkuma, Krsna, Sarangi, Indravali, Siva, Taravali, Gunavati, Sumukhi, Keli-manjari, Haravali, Cakoraksi, Bharati and Kamala.

questions.question: Who is explicitly named as the primary rival of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text identifies Candravali as the rival of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of these gopis is listed as one of the friends belonging to Candravali's group?
questions.explanation: Padma is listed among the gopis who are friends of Candravali.

questions.question: Among the gopis associated with Candravali, which of these names appears in the list?
questions.explanation: Manjubhasini is explicitly named as a friend of Candravali in the listed group.

questions.question: Which of the following gopis is identified as a companion within Candravali's circle?
questions.explanation: Keli-manjari is specifically listed among the friends of Candravali.

questions.question: Which gopi is included as a member of Candravali's group of friends?
questions.explanation: Cakoraksi is included in the list of friends belonging to Candravali.

2.140.verse_text: The beautiful gopis may be considered in hundreds of groups, each group containing hundreds of thousands of gopis.

2.141.verse_text: Among all these gopis the most important are Srimati Radharani, Candravali, Bhadra, Syama and Palika. These gopis are full of all transcendental good qualities.

questions.question: Which five gopis are designated as the most important among all the transcendental gopis of Vraja?
options: Radharani, Candravali, Bhadra, Syama, and Palika
Radharani, Lalita, Visakha, Citra, and Tungavidya
Radharani, Candravali, Saibya, Padma, and Mukhara
Radharani, Bhadra, Syama, Palika, and Rupa-manjari
questions.correct_answer: Radharani, Candravali, Bhadra, Syama, and Palika
questions.explanation: The text explicitly identifies these five as the most important among all the gopis.

2.142.verse_text: Of these gopis Srimati Radharani and Candravali are the best. Each of them has millions of doe-eyed gopi followers.

questions.question: Among the five primary gopis described, which two are considered the very best?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly identifies Srimati Radharani and Candravali as the two best among the gopis mentioned.

questions.question: How many doe-eyed gopi followers are said to accompany each of the supreme gopis, Srimati Radharani and Candravali?
questions.explanation: The verse confirms that both Srimati Radharani and Candravali each have millions of doe-eyed followers.

2.143.verse_text: Because She possesses all charm and sweetness, Srimati Radharani is the better of the two. She is supremely famous. In the Sruti-sastra She is known by the name Gandharva-devi.

questions.question: By what specific name is Srimati Radharani known within the Sruti-sastra?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states that in the Sruti-sastra, Srimati Radharani is known as Gandharva-devi.

questions.question: Why is Srimati Radharani considered superior to Candravali?
options: Because She possesses all charm and sweetness
Because She is the queen of Vraja
Because She possesses the most opulence
Because She is the daughter of Vrsabhanu
questions.correct_answer: Because She possesses all charm and sweetness
questions.explanation: The text explains that Srimati Radharani is the better of the two because She possesses all charm and sweetness.

2.144.verse_text: Sri Krsna, the cowherd prince whose charming sweetness has no equal or superior, is very dear to Srimati Radharani. She considers Him millions and millions of times more dear than Her own life's breath.

questions.question: How does Srimati Radharani value Sri Krsna in comparison to Her own life's breath?
options: She considers Him equal to Her life.
She considers Him millions and millions of times more dear than Her life.
She considers Him the support of Her life but secondary to Her friends.
She considers Him merely as dear as Her own existence.
questions.correct_answer: She considers Him millions and millions of times more dear than Her life.
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly states that Srimati Radharani considers Sri Krsna millions and millions of times more dear than Her own life's breath.

questions.question: What is the unique characteristic attributed to the charming sweetness of the cowherd prince, Sri Krsna?
options: It is surpassed only by the sweetness of Srimati Radharani.
It has no equal or superior.
It is matched only by the sweetness of the Vraja-gopis.
It is equal to the sweetness of the residents of Vaikuntha.
questions.correct_answer: It has no equal or superior.
questions.explanation: The verse describes Sri Krsna as the cowherd prince whose charming sweetness possesses no equal or superior.

2.145.verse_text: Now the beauty of Srimati Radharani's trancendental form will be described. Srimati Radharani is expert in all the fine arts and Her transcendental form is like an ocean of nectar.

questions.question: What is the primary characteristic of Srimati Radharani's transcendental form in relation to the fine arts?
options: She is the foremost teacher of all arts
She is expert in all the fine arts
She is the creator of the sixty-four arts
She is the enjoyer of all musical arts
questions.correct_answer: She is expert in all the fine arts
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states that Srimati Radharani is expert in all the fine arts.

questions.question: To what is the transcendental form of Srimati Radharani compared?
questions.explanation: The text describes Srimati Radharani's transcendental form as an ocean of nectar.

2.146.verse_text: Her splendid bodily luster is like the yellow pigment gorocana, molten gold, or stationary lightning.

questions.question: To which substances is the splendid bodily luster of Srimati Radharani compared?
options: Gorocana, molten gold, and stationary lightning
Lotus petals, moonlight, and morning dew
Saffron, turmeric, and rays of the sun
A golden campaka flower, honey, and stars
questions.correct_answer: Gorocana, molten gold, and stationary lightning
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's bodily luster is described as being like gorocana, molten gold, or stationary lightning.

questions.question: Which of these is explicitly mentioned as a comparison for the radiant complexion of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text specifically likens Her bodily luster to stationary lightning, among other golden-hued substances.

questions.question: What pigment is used to describe the golden radiance of Srimati Radharani's transcendental form?
questions.explanation: The verse identifies gorocana as one of the primary comparisons for Srimati Radharani's splendid bodily luster.

2.147.verse_text: She wears wonderfully beautiful blue garments and She is decorated with various pearls and flowers.

questions.question: What is the color of the garments worn by the beautiful Radhika?
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly states that She wears wonderfully beautiful blue garments.

questions.question: With which two types of items is the divine Srimati Radharani decorated, as described in Her specific attire?
questions.explanation: The text confirms that She is decorated with various pearls and flowers.

2.148.verse_text: She is very beautiful and She has long nicely braided hair. She is decorated with a garland of flowers and a beautiful pearl necklace.

questions.question: Which specific adornment rests upon the body of the beautiful gopi mentioned, besides her pearl necklace?
options: A cluster of blue lotus buds
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly states that she is decorated with a garland of flowers and a beautiful pearl necklace.

questions.question: What kind of necklace is described as decorating the beautiful gopi who wears a garland of flowers?
options: A garland of wild forest flowers
questions.explanation: The verse identifies that she is decorated with a beautiful pearl necklace in addition to a garland of flowers.

questions.question: How is the style of the hair of the beautiful gopi described?
questions.explanation: The verse describes her as having long nicely braided hair.

2.149.verse_text: Her splendid forehead is decorated with the red pigment sindura and with beautiful locks of curling hair.

questions.question: Which specific substance is used to decorate the forehead of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states that Srimati Radharani's forehead is decorated with the red pigment sindura.

questions.question: Besides the application of sindura, what other prominent feature characterizes the forehead of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The description identifies both red sindura and beautiful locks of curling hair as the adornments upon Her forehead.

2.150.verse_text: Decorated with blue bangles, Her arms have defeated Cupid's staff with their beauty.

questions.question: What is the color of the bangles adorning the arms of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's arms are described as being decorated with blue bangles.

questions.question: The beauty of Srimati Radharani's arms is famously described as having defeated what object?
questions.explanation: The scriptural description explicitly states that Srimati Radharani's arms have defeated Cupid's staff with their beauty.

2.151.verse_text: Decorated with black mascara and reaching back almost to Her ears, Srimati Radharani's lotus eyes are the most beautiful in all the three planetary systems.

questions.question: What specifically decorates Srimati Radharani's lotus eyes?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's lotus eyes are described as being decorated with black mascara.

questions.question: How far back do the lotus eyes of Srimati Radharani reach?
options: To the middle of Her forehead
questions.explanation: The eyes of Srimati Radharani are described as extending back almost to Her ears.

questions.question: Which of Srimati Radharani's facial features are described as the most beautiful in all the three planetary systems?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's lotus eyes are acclaimed as the most beautiful in all the three planetary systems.

2.152.verse_text: Her nose is as beautiful as a sesame flower and it is nicely decorated with a pearl. She is anointed with various perfumes. She is splendidly beautiful.

questions.question: To what object of nature is the beauty of Srimati Radharani's nose compared?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's nose is explicitly described as being as beautiful as a sesame flower.

questions.question: What specific ornament is worn by Srimati Radharani to decorate Her nose?
questions.explanation: The text describes Srimati Radharani's nose as being nicely decorated with a pearl.

questions.question: How is Srimati Radharani's body prepared or adorned regarding fragrances?
options: She is anointed with various perfumes
She is bathed in floral waters
She is decorated with sandalwood paste
She is sprinkled with aguru oil
questions.correct_answer: She is anointed with various perfumes
questions.explanation: The text notes that Srimati Radharani is anointed with various perfumes.

2.153.verse_text: Her ears are decorated with wonderful earrings and Her nectarean lips defeat the red lotus flowers.

questions.question: What specifically adorns the ears of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states that Her ears are decorated with wonderful earrings.

questions.question: To which object is the beauty of Srimati Radharani’s nectarean lips compared?
questions.explanation: The verse states that Her nectarean lips defeat the beauty of red lotus flowers.

2.154.verse_text: Her teeth are like a row of pearls and Her tongue is very beautiful. Decorated with a nectarean smile of pure love for Krsna, Her beautiful face is a splendid as millions of moons.

questions.question: To what are the teeth of Srimati Radharani compared in their radiant beauty?
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly compares the teeth of Srimati Radharani to a row of pearls.

questions.question: What specifically decorates the beautiful face of Srimati Radharani, enhancing Her love for Krsna?
options: A nectarean smile of pure love
A glowing mark of sandalwood paste
questions.correct_answer: A nectarean smile of pure love
questions.explanation: Her face is described as being decorated with a nectarean smile of pure love for Krsna.

questions.question: How does the splendor of Srimati Radharani's face compare to the moon?
options: As splendid as millions of moons
Brighter than a thousand full moons
More cooling than a cool moon
Like the luster of a silver moon
questions.correct_answer: As splendid as millions of moons
questions.explanation: The verse states that Her beautiful face is as splendid as millions of moons.

2.155.verse_text: The beauty of Her chin has defeated and bewildered the demigod Cupid. Decorated with a drop of musk, Her chin appears like a golden lotus flower with a bumblebee.

questions.question: What is the physical feature of Srimati Radharani that is described as being so beautiful it bewilders the demigod Cupid?
questions.explanation: The beauty of Srimati Radharani's chin is described as having defeated and bewildered Cupid.

questions.question: What kind of ornamental decoration is placed upon Srimati Radharani's chin?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's chin is decorated with a drop of musk.

questions.question: To which flower is the appearance of Srimati Radharani's chin compared when it is decorated with a drop of musk?
questions.explanation: When decorated with a drop of musk, Srimati Radharani's chin appears like a golden lotus flower.

questions.question: What insect is Srimati Radharani's chin compared to when the musk drop serves as the focal point on the golden lotus of Her chin?
questions.explanation: The drop of musk on Her chin makes it appear like a golden lotus flower with a bumblebee.

2.156.verse_text: Bearing all the marks of wonderful beauty, Her neck is decorated with a string of pearls. Her neck, back and sides are enchantingly beautiful.

questions.question: What specific ornament is described as decorating the neck of Srimati Radharani?
options: A garland of wild forest flowers
A golden chain with a sapphire pendant
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's neck is specifically adorned with a string of pearls, enhancing Her wonderful beauty.

questions.question: Besides the neck, which other parts of Srimati Radharani's transcendental form are mentioned as being enchantingly beautiful?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states that besides Her neck, Her back and sides are also enchantingly beautiful.

2.157.verse_text: Her beautiful breasts are like two splendid waterpots covered with a bodice and decorated with a necklace of pearls.

questions.question: What is the physical shape of Srimati Radharani's breasts as described in the nectar of Her bodily features?
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly compares the breasts of Srimati Radharani to two splendid waterpots.

questions.question: What decorative item is worn by Srimati Radharani specifically over Her breasts, in addition to Her bodice?
options: A string of fragrant malati buds
questions.explanation: The verse states that Her breasts are decorated with a necklace of pearls.

2.158.verse_text: Her beautiful enchanting arms are decorated with jeweled armlets.

questions.question: What specifically adorns the enchanting arms of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states that Her beautiful enchanting arms are decorated with jeweled armlets.

2.159.verse_text: Her arms are also decorated with jeweled bracelets and other kinds of jeweled ornaments. Her hands are like two red lotus flowers illuminated by the series of moons that are Her fingernails

questions.question: Besides jeweled armlets, what specific types of ornaments decorate the arms of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly mentions that Srimati Radharani's arms are adorned with jeweled bracelets and other jeweled ornaments.

questions.question: To what are the hands of Srimati Radharani compared in their beauty and color?
questions.explanation: The text describes Srimati Radharani's hands as being like two red lotus flowers.

questions.question: What parts of Srimati Radharani's hands are poetically described as a series of moons that illuminate Her lotus-like hands?
questions.explanation: The text states that the series of moons that are Her fingernails illuminate Her hands, which are like red lotus flowers.

2.160.verse_text: Auspicious Markings on Srimati Radharani's Hands: Srimati Radharani's hands are decorated with many auspicious markings such as the signs of the bumblebee, lotus, crescent moon, earring, parasol, sacrificial post, conchshell, tree, flower, camara and svastika.

questions.question: Which auspicious marking, representing the sign of a persistent lover, is present on Srimati Radharani's hands?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's hands are decorated with the sign of the bumblebee among other auspicious markings.

questions.question: Which of the following sacred motifs, found on Srimati Radharani's lotus hands, is specifically listed as a symbol of royal protection or a parasol?
questions.explanation: The markings on Srimati Radharani's hands include the sign of the parasol.

questions.question: Which celestial tool used for bathing the Deities is mentioned as a marking on Srimati Radharani's hands?
questions.explanation: The camara (whisk) is listed among the auspicious markings found on Srimati Radharani's hands.

questions.question: Which of these geometric symbols is described as being present on the hands of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The svastika is one of the auspicious signs specifically mentioned as decorating Srimati Radharani's hands.

questions.question: Besides the bumblebee and lotus, which of the following is explicitly stated as an auspicious marking on Srimati Radharani's hands?
questions.explanation: The sacrificial post is explicitly named as one of the many auspicious markings on Srimati Radharani's hands.

2.161.verse_text: These auspicious marks are manifest in various ways on Srimati Radharani's lotus hands. Her splendidly beautiful fingers are also decorated with jeweled rings.

questions.question: What specifically adorns Srimati Radharani's lotus fingers according to the descriptions of Her divine form?
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly states that Srimati Radharani's fingers are decorated with jeweled rings.

2.162.verse_text: Charming, full of sweet nectar and decorated with a deep navel, Srimati Radharani's beautiful waist enchants the three worlds.

questions.question: What unique physical feature of Srimati Radharani's waist is described as enchanting the three worlds?
questions.explanation: The text describes Srimati Radharani's waist as being decorated with a deep navel.

questions.question: How is the quality of Srimati Radharani's waist characterized in its ability to enchant the three worlds?
options: It is full of sweet nectar
It is adorned with blue pearls
questions.correct_answer: It is full of sweet nectar
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's waist is described as charming and full of sweet nectar.

2.163.verse_text: Her sloping hips lead to Her charmingly beautiful slender waist, which is bound by a creeper of three beautiful folds of skin and decorated with a sash of tinkling bells.

questions.question: What ornament is described as decorating Srimati Radharani's slender waist?
options: A girdle of golden lotus petals
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's waist is specifically described as being decorated with a sash of tinkling bells.

questions.question: What feature is said to form a creeper upon Srimati Radharani's slender waist?
questions.explanation: Her waist is described as being bound by a creeper consisting of three beautiful folds of skin.

2.164.verse_text: As beautiful as two exquisite plantain trees, Her thighs enchant the mind of Cupid. Her beautiful knees are like two reservoirs filled with the nectar of various transcendental pastimes.

questions.question: What standard of beauty does the poet use to describe the thighs of Srimati Radharani?
options: Two trunks of a celestial elephant
questions.explanation: The text explicitly compares the beauty of Srimati Radharani's thighs to two exquisite plantain trees.

questions.question: Whose mind is enchanted by the beauty of Srimati Radharani's thighs?
questions.explanation: The verse states that Srimati Radharani's thighs enchant the mind of Cupid.

questions.question: To what are the beautiful knees of Srimati Radharani compared?
options: Two shining gems in the dark
Two reservoirs filled with the nectar of transcendental pastimes
Two lotus buds emerging from a pond
Two bright moons in the night sky
questions.correct_answer: Two reservoirs filled with the nectar of transcendental pastimes
questions.explanation: The description identifies Her knees as being like two reservoirs filled with the nectar of various transcendental pastimes.

2.165.verse_text: Her beautiful lotus feet are decorated with jeweled ankle-bells and Her toes with toe rings as beautiful as the treasure of Varuna.

questions.question: What specifically decorates the beautiful lotus feet of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states that Srimati Radharani's lotus feet are decorated with jeweled ankle-bells.

questions.question: To what are the toe rings adorning the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani compared?
options: The light of the morning sun
questions.explanation: The verse describes the toe rings on Srimati Radharani's lotus feet as being as beautiful as the treasure of Varuna.

2.166.verse_text: The Auspicious Markings on Srimati Radharani's Lotus Feet: The auspicious markings on Srimati Radharani's lotus feet include the signs of the conchshell, moon, elephant, barleycorn, rod for controlling elephants, chariot flag, small drum, svastika and fish.

questions.question: Which auspicious marking, representing the sign of a conchshell, is found on the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly lists the conchshell as one of the auspicious markings on Srimati Radharani's lotus feet.

questions.question: Among the auspicious markings adorning the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani, which sign resembles the celestial moon?
questions.explanation: The text enumerates the moon as one of the specific auspicious signs appearing on the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of the following animals is identified as one of the auspicious markings on the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The elephant is listed in the verse as an auspicious marking found on the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which agricultural sign, known as a barleycorn, is mentioned as an auspicious marking on the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The barleycorn is included in the list of auspicious markings detailing the decoration of Srimati Radharani's lotus feet.

questions.question: Which implement, described as a rod for controlling elephants, is present as an auspicious mark on the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text identifies the rod for controlling elephants as a specific auspicious marking on Srimati Radharani's lotus feet.

questions.question: Which symbol of victory, specifically a chariot flag, is found among the markings on Srimati Radharani's lotus feet?
questions.explanation: The chariot flag is one of the auspicious signs enumerated in the text as adorning Srimati Radharani's lotus feet.

questions.question: Which musical instrument, described as a small drum, is marked on the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The small drum is explicitly named as one of the auspicious markings on Srimati Radharani's lotus feet.

questions.question: Which sacred geometric symbol is listed as an auspicious marking on the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The svastika is clearly identified as one of the auspicious markings residing on Srimati Radharani's lotus feet.

questions.question: Among the auspicious markings on the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani, which aquatic creature is mentioned?
questions.explanation: The fish is one of the auspicious signs listed as being present on the lotus feet of Srimati Radharani.

2.167.verse_text: Srimati Radharani is fifteen years old and full of the luster of youth.

questions.question: What is the exact age of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani is described as being fifteen years old.

2.168.verse_text: Yasoda-devi, the queen of the cowherds, is more affectionate to Radharani than millions of mothers can be. Radharani's father is King Vrsabhanu, who is as splendid as the sun.

questions.question: What is the nature of Yasoda-devi's affection toward Srimati Radharani?
options: Equal to the love for her own son
Comparable to the affection of a teacher
questions.explanation: Yasoda-devi, the queen of the cowherds, is described as having more affection for Radharani than millions of mothers can be.

questions.question: Who is the father of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Radharani's father is King Vrsabhanu.

questions.question: To what celestial object is the splendor of King Vrsabhanu compared?
questions.explanation: King Vrsabhanu is described as being as splendid as the sun.

2.169.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's mother is Kirtida-devi, who is also known in this world as Ratnagarbha-devi. Radharani's paternal grandfather is Mahibhanu and Her maternal grandfather is Indu.

questions.question: What is the name of Srimati Radharani's mother, who is also known in this world as Ratnagarbha-devi?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's mother is explicitly identified as Kirtida-devi, who is also known as Ratnagarbha-devi.

questions.question: Which alternative name is attributed to Kirtida-devi, the mother of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text states that Kirtida-devi, the mother of Srimati Radharani, is known in this world as Ratnagarbha-devi.

questions.question: Who is the paternal grandfather of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Mahibhanu is identified as the paternal grandfather of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: What is the name of the maternal grandfather of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Indu is named as the maternal grandfather of Srimati Radharani.

2.170.verse_text: Her maternal grandmother is Mukhara-devi and Her paternal grandmother is Sukhada-devi. Her father's brothers (Her uncles) are Ratnabhanu, Subhanu and Bhanu.

questions.question: Who is the paternal grandmother of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's paternal grandmother is identified as Sukhada-devi.

questions.question: Which personality is the maternal grandmother of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Mukhara-devi is the maternal grandmother of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of the following is listed as one of Srimati Radharani's paternal uncles?
questions.explanation: Ratnabhanu is explicitly named as one of Srimati Radharani's paternal uncles.

questions.question: Aside from Ratnabhanu, who are the other two paternal uncles of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's paternal uncles are Ratnabhanu, Subhanu, and Bhanu.

2.171.verse_text: Bhadrakirti, Mahakirti and Kirticandra are Radharani's materal uncles. Menaka-devi, Sasthi-devi, Gauri-devi, Dhatri-devi and Dhataki-devi are Radharani's materal aunts.

questions.question: Which of the following associates is identified as one of Srimati Radharani's maternal uncles?
questions.explanation: Bhadrakirti is explicitly listed as one of Srimati Radharani's maternal uncles.

questions.question: Who among the following is listed as a maternal uncle of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Mahakirti is identified as one of the maternal uncles of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of these personalities is recognized as a maternal uncle of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Kirticandra is recorded as being one of Srimati Radharani's maternal uncles.

questions.question: Which of the following is named as a maternal aunt of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Menaka-devi is listed as one of the maternal aunts of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of the following gopis is listed as one of Srimati Radharani's maternal aunts?
questions.explanation: Sasthi-devi, Gauri-devi, and Dhatri-devi are all explicitly mentioned as maternal aunts of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of these figures is counted among the maternal aunts of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Dhataki-devi is specifically identified as one of Srimati Radharani's maternal aunts.

2.172.verse_text: Radharani's mother's sister is Kirtimati-devi, whose husband is Kasa. Radharani's father's sister is Bhanumudra-devi, whose husband is Kusa.

questions.question: What is the name of Srimati Radharani's maternal aunt who is the sister of Her mother?
questions.explanation: Kirtimati-devi is identified as the sister of Srimati Radharani's mother.

questions.question: Who is the husband of Srimati Radharani's maternal aunt, Kirtimati-devi?
questions.explanation: Kirtimati-devi, the maternal aunt of Srimati Radharani, is married to Kasa.

questions.question: Which relative of Srimati Radharani is named Bhanumudra-devi?
questions.explanation: Bhanumudra-devi is identified specifically as the sister of Srimati Radharani's father.

questions.question: Who is the husband of Srimati Radharani's paternal aunt, Bhanumudra-devi?
questions.explanation: Bhanumudra-devi, the paternal aunt of Srimati Radharani, is married to Kusa.

2.173.verse_text: Radharani's elder brother is Sridama and Her younger sister is Ananga-manjari. Radharani's father-in-law is Vrkagopa and Her brother-in-law is Durmada.

questions.question: Who is the elder brother of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Sridama is specifically identified as the elder brother of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: What is the name of Srimati Radharani's younger sister?
questions.explanation: Ananga-manjari is identified as the younger sister of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Who serves as the father-in-law of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Vrkagopa is established as the father-in-law of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Who is the brother-in-law of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Durmada is identified as the brother-in-law of Srimati Radharani.

2.174.verse_text: Jatila-devi is Radharani's mother-in-law and Abhimanyu is Radharani's so-called husband. Kutila-devi, who is always eager to find fault, is Radharani's sister-in-law.

questions.question: Who holds the position of Srimati Radharani's mother-in-law?
questions.explanation: Jatila-devi is explicitly identified as the mother-in-law of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which personality is known as the so-called husband of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Abhimanyu is designated as the so-called husband of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Who is the sister-in-law of Srimati Radharani that is constantly characterized as being eager to find fault?
questions.explanation: Kutila-devi is identified as Radharani's sister-in-law and is described as always being eager to find fault.

2.175.verse_text: Lalita, Visakha, Sucitra, Campakalata, Ranga-devi, Sudevi, Tungavidya and Indulekha are the eight dearest friends of Srimati Radharani. These gopis are considered the leaders of all the others.

questions.question: Who is included as one of the eight dearest friends of Srimati Radharani alongside Visakha, Sucitra, and Campakalata?
questions.explanation: Lalita is explicitly listed as one of the eight primary sakhis of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of the following gopis is recognized as one of the eight dearest friends and leaders among Srimati Radharani's companions?
questions.explanation: Ranga-devi is identified as one of the eight primary leaders of Srimati Radharani's dearest friends.

questions.question: Along with Sudevi and Tungavidya, who completes the group of eight primary friends of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Indulekha is one of the eight primary sakhis of Srimati Radharani, along with Sudevi and Tungavidya.

questions.question: How many gopis are identified as the leaders and dearest friends of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text identifies eight specific gopis as the primary dearest friends and leaders of all other gopis.

2.176.verse_text: Kurangaksi, Mandali, Mankiundala, Matali, Candralalita, Madhavi, Madanalasa, Manjumedha, Sasikala, Sumadhya, Madhureksana, Kamala, Kamalatika, Gunacuda, Varangada, Madhuri, Candrika, Prema-manjari, Tanumadhyama, Kandarpa-sundari and Manjukesi are among the millions of dear friends (priya-sakhi) of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of these gopis is numbered among the millions of dear friends (priya-sakhi) of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Kurangaksi is explicitly listed in the group of priya-sakhis of Srimati Radharani in the specified verse.

questions.question: Who among the following is identified as a priya-sakhi of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Sasikala is mentioned as one of the dear friends (priya-sakhi) of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of these gopis is recognized as a dear friend (priya-sakhi) of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Madanalasa is listed among the priya-sakhis of Srimati Radharani in the described verse.

questions.question: Which of these associates is counted among the millions of priya-sakhis of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Manjukesi is included in the catalog of the priya-sakhis of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which gopi is explicitly named as a priya-sakhi of Srimati Radharani in the list of her dear friends?
questions.explanation: Kamalatika is identified as one of the priya-sakhis of Srimati Radharani.

2.177.verse_text: Lasika, Kelikandali, Kadambari, Sasimukhi, Candrarekha, Priyamvada, Madonmada, Madhumati, Vasanti, Kalabhasini, Ratnavali, Manimati and Karpuralatika are among those friends (jivita-sakhi) for whom Srimati Radharani is as dear as life.

questions.question: Which of the following gopis is counted among the jivita-sakhis of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Lasika is explicitly listed as a jivita-sakhi in the verse, whereas Kasturi, Manojna, and Manimanjari are categorized as nitya-sakhis.

questions.question: Among the friends for whom Srimati Radharani is as dear as life, which individual is named Kelikandali?
questions.explanation: The verse categorizes Kelikandali as one of the jivita-sakhis, those for whom Srimati Radharani is as dear as life.

questions.question: Who among the following gopis is recognized as a jivita-sakhi of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Kadambari is identified as a jivita-sakhi, while Sindura, Candanavati, and Kaumudi belong to the nitya-sakhi group.

questions.question: Which gopi is included in the list of Srimati Radharani's jivita-sakhis alongside Sasimukhi and Candrarekha?
questions.explanation: Priyamvada is listed as a jivita-sakhi of Srimati Radharani along with Sasimukhi and Candrarekha.

questions.question: Which gopi, identified as a jivita-sakhi, serves Srimati Radharani alongside Madonmada and Madhumati?
questions.explanation: Vasanti is listed alongside Madonmada and Madhumati as one of the jivita-sakhis of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of these associates is classified as a jivita-sakhi of Srimati Radharani, appearing in the group containing Kalabhasini, Ratnavali, and Manimati?
questions.explanation: Karpuralatika is one of the jivita-sakhis mentioned in the list that includes Kalabhasini, Ratnavali, and Manimati.

2.178.verse_text: Kasturi, Manojna, Manimanjari, Sindura, Candanavati, Kaumudi and Madira are among Sriamti Radharani's eternal friends (nitya-sakhi).

questions.question: Which of these gopis is listed as one of the eternal friends, or nitya-sakhi, of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Kasturi is explicitly listed among the nitya-sakhi of Srimati Radharani in the specified verse.

questions.question: Who among the following is included in the category of Srimati Radharani's nitya-sakhi friends?
questions.explanation: Manojna is enumerated as one of the nitya-sakhi companions of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which friend is identified as one of Srimati Radharani's eternal nitya-sakhi?
questions.explanation: Manimanjari is named as one of the nitya-sakhi in the listing of Srimati Radharani's friends.

questions.question: Among the following gopis, who is recognized as one of the nitya-sakhi companions of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Sindura is identified as a nitya-sakhi of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of these sakhis belongs to the group of nitya-sakhi friends of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Candanavati is mentioned in the verse as one of the nitya-sakhi of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of these gopis is documented as a nitya-sakhi of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Kaumudi is listed among the nitya-sakhi of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Who is included in the list of Srimati Radharani's eternal nitya-sakhi companions?
questions.explanation: Madira is counted as one of the nitya-sakhi companions of Srimati Radharani.

2.179-181.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's Manjari Friends: Ananga-manjari, Rupa-manjari, Rati-manjari, Lavanga-manjari, Raga-manjari, Rasa-manjari, Vilasa-manjari, Prema-manjari, Mani-manjari, Suvarna-manjari, Kama-manjari, Ratna-manjari, Kasturi-manjari, Gandha-manjari, Netra-manjari, Sripadma-manjari, Lila-manjari and Hema-manjari are among Srimati Radharani's manjari friends. Prema-manjari and Rati-manjari are both also known by the name Bhanumati-devi.

questions.question: Which of these manjari friends is counted among the eternal companions of Srimati Radharani alongside Rupa-manjari and Rati-manjari?
questions.explanation: Ananga-manjari is explicitly listed among the manjari friends of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which two of Srimati Radharani's manjari friends share the additional name Bhanumati-devi?
questions.explanation: The text states that both Prema-manjari and Rati-manjari are known by the name Bhanumati-devi.

questions.question: Which of the following is listed as one of the manjari friends of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Lavanga-manjari is identified as one of the manjari friends in the list provided.

questions.question: Which manjari friend appears in the list alongside Netra-manjari and Sripadma-manjari?
questions.explanation: Gandha-manjari is mentioned immediately following Kasturi-manjari and preceding Netra-manjari in the list of manjari friends.

questions.question: Besides Suvarna-manjari and Kama-manjari, which manjari friend is mentioned in the same grouping?
questions.explanation: Ratna-manjari follows Kama-manjari in the enumeration of Srimati Radharani's manjari friends.

2.182.verse_text: The Objects of Srimati Radharani's Worship: Srimati Radharani's worshipable deity is the sun-god, who enlivens the lotus flowers and acts as an eye for the entire world. Srimati Radharani's maha-mantra is the name of Lord Krsna. Srimati Radharani's benefactor, who brings Her all good fortune, is Bhagavati Paurnamasi.

questions.question: Which solar deity is honored as the worshipable deity of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's worshipable deity is the sun-god, who acts as the eye for the entire world and enlivens the lotus flowers.

questions.question: What is the maha-mantra of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's maha-mantra is defined specifically as the name of Lord Krsna.

questions.question: Who serves as the benefactor of Srimati Radharani, bringing Her all good fortune?
questions.explanation: Bhagavati Paurnamasi is identified as the benefactor of Srimati Radharani who bestows all good fortune upon Her.

2.183.verse_text: Specific Description of Various Gopis: Lalita-devi and the other eight principal gopis, the other gopis and the manjari have forms that are for the most part like the transcendental form of Srimati Radharani, the queen of Vrndavana.

questions.question: The transcendental forms of Lalita-devi and the eight principal gopis are described as being mostly identical to whom?
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly states that the forms of Lalita-devi and the other eight principal gopis are for the most part like the transcendental form of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Aside from the eight principal gopis, what other groups of gopis share a similar transcendental form with Srimati Radharani?
options: The manjari and the other gopis
The wives of the Vedic sages
questions.correct_answer: The manjari and the other gopis
questions.explanation: The text mentions that the other gopis and the manjari also possess forms mostly like that of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: What title is specifically used for Srimati Radharani in the context of describing the forms of the principal gopis?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani is specifically referred to as the queen of Vrndavana within the description of the forms of the gopis.

2.184.verse_text: Vrnda-devi, Kundalat-devi and their followaers assist the divine couple in Their pastimes in the various forests of Vrndavana. Dhanistha-devi, Gunamala-devi and their followers remain in the home of Nanda Maharaja,the cowherd king and assist the Lord's pastimes from there.

questions.question: Which two personalities, along with their followers, are dedicated to assisting the divine couple in the various forests of Vrndavana?
questions.explanation: Vrnda-devi and Kundalata-devi are the specific associates mentioned as assisting the divine couple with their followers within the forests of Vrndavana.

questions.question: Which two associates reside within the home of Nanda Maharaja to assist the Lord's pastimes from there?
questions.explanation: Dhanistha-devi and Gunamala-devi are specifically identified as remaining in the home of the cowherd king Nanda Maharaja to facilitate the Lord's pastimes.

2.185.verse_text: Kamada-devi is the daughter of Srimati Radharani's nurse. Kamada is an especially close friend of Radharani. Ragalekha-devi, Kalakeli-devi and Manjula-devi are some of Radharani's maidservants.

questions.question: Whose daughter is Kamada-devi, the close friend of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Kamada-devi is explicitly identified as the daughter of Srimati Radharani's nurse.

questions.question: Which of the following gopis is described as an especially close friend of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Kamada-devi is specifically highlighted for being an especially close friend of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of these gopis serves Srimati Radharani as a maidservant?
questions.explanation: Ragalekha-devi, along with Kalakeli-devi and Manjula-devi, is identified as one of the maidservants of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which gopi is listed alongside Ragalekha-devi and Manjula-devi as a maidservant of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The text lists Ragalekha-devi, Kalakeli-devi, and Manjula-devi as maidservants of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of the following gopis is one of the maidservants of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Manjula-devi is one of the three maidservants of Srimati Radharani mentioned in the text.

2.186.verse_text: Nandimukhi-devi and Bindumati-devi are the leaders of those gopis who arrange the rendezvous of Radha and Krsna. Syamala-devi and Mangala-devi are the leaders of those gopis who act as well-wishers of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which two gopis serve as the leaders responsible for arranging the secret rendezvous between Sri Sri Radha and Krsna?
questions.explanation: Nandimukhi-devi and Bindumati-devi are explicitly identified as the leaders who arrange the meetings of the Divine Couple.

questions.question: Who are the two gopis recognized as the primary leaders acting as the well-wishers of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Syamala-devi and Mangala-devi are identified as the leaders of the group of gopis who act as well-wishers for Srimati Radharani.

2.187.verse_text: Candravali-devi is the leader of those gopis who are Srimati Radharani's rivals.

questions.question: Who serves as the leader of the gopis who are rivals of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Candravali-devi is explicitly identified as the leader of the gopis who maintain a rival status toward Srimati Radharani.

2.188.verse_text: The talented musicians Rasollasa-devi, Gunatunga-devi,Kalakanthi-devi, Sukhanti-devi, and Pikakanti-devi delight Lord Hari by singing Visakha's musical compositions.

questions.question: Which musical compositions are performed by the gopis Rasollasa-devi, Gunatunga-devi, Kalakanthi-devi, Sukhanti-devi, and Pikakanti-devi to please Lord Hari?
questions.explanation: Rasollasa-devi, Gunatunga-devi, Kalakanthi-devi, Sukhanti-devi, and Pikakanti-devi are described as delighting Lord Hari specifically by singing compositions authored by Visakha.

questions.question: Which of the following gopis is recognized for delighting Lord Hari by singing Visakha's musical compositions?
questions.explanation: Rasollasa-devi is explicitly listed as one of the musicians who sings Visakha's compositions to please the Lord.

questions.question: Among the five gopis who sing Visakha's compositions for Lord Hari, which gopi is identified as Gunatunga-devi?
options: A musician who delights Lord Hari
A servant who plays the drums
A companion who brings flower garlands
questions.correct_answer: A musician who delights Lord Hari
questions.explanation: Gunatunga-devi is listed as a talented musician among the group that sings Visakha's compositions to delight the Lord.

questions.question: Which gopi, alongside Rasollasa-devi, Gunatunga-devi, Kalakanthi-devi, and Pikakanti-devi, is part of the ensemble that sings Visakha's musical compositions?
questions.explanation: Sukhanti-devi is one of the five gopis mentioned who sing the musical compositions of Visakha-devi.

questions.question: Who is the gopi identified as Pikakanti-devi in the context of musical service offered to Lord Hari?
options: A talented musician who sings Visakha's compositions
A gopi who plays the vina for the Divine Couple
A leader of the rival gopis
A maiden who arranges flowers for the forest bower
questions.correct_answer: A talented musician who sings Visakha's compositions
questions.explanation: Pikakanti-devi is specifically named as one of the talented musicians who sings Visakha's musical compositions to delight the Lord.

2.189.verse_text: Maniki-devi, Narmada-devi, and Kusumapesala-devi serve the divine couple by playing drums, cymbals, string instruments like the vina, and wind instruments like the flute.

questions.question: Which specific instrument is Maniki-devi, Narmada-devi, and Kusumapesala-devi associated with playing as they serve the divine couple?
options: Drums, cymbals, string instruments, and wind instruments
Only string instruments like the vina
Only flutes and small conch shells
Large kettle drums and golden trumpets
questions.correct_answer: Drums, cymbals, string instruments, and wind instruments
questions.explanation: Maniki-devi, Narmada-devi, and Kusumapesala-devi are described as serving the divine couple by playing drums, cymbals, string instruments like the vina, and wind instruments like the flute.

questions.question: Which of the following gopis serves the divine couple alongside Maniki-devi and Kusumapesala-devi through musical performance?
questions.explanation: Maniki-devi, Narmada-devi, and Kusumapesala-devi are specifically listed together as musicians serving the divine couple.

questions.question: Besides playing drums, cymbals, and flutes, which specific string instrument is mentioned as being played by the gopis Maniki-devi, Narmada-devi, and Kusumapesala-devi?
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly states that these gopis play string instruments like the vina to serve the divine couple.

2.190.verse_text: In this way we have described some of the sakhis (gopi friends), nitya-sakhis (eternal gopi friends), prana-sakhis (gopi friends who are as dear as life), priya-sakhis (dear gopi friends) and parama-prestha-sakhis (dearest gopi friends)

2.191.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's Maidservants: Ragalekha-devi, Kalakeli-devi and Bhurida-devi are the leaders fo those gopis who are Srimati Radharani's maidservants. Among these maidservants are Sugandha-devi and Nalini-devi (the two daughters of Divakirti-devi) and Manjistha-devi and Rangaraga-devi (the two daughters of Nanda Maharaja's laundry washers).

questions.question: Which three gopis serve as the leaders of Srimati Radharani’s maidservants?
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly identifies Ragalekha-devi, Kalakeli-devi, and Bhurida-devi as the leaders of Srimati Radharani's maidservants.

questions.question: Who are the two daughters of Divakirti-devi who serve as maidservants to Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Sugandha-devi and Nalini-devi are identified as the two daughters of Divakirti-devi, serving as Srimati Radharani's maidservants.

questions.question: Which two maidservants of Srimati Radharani are recognized as the daughters of Nanda Maharaja's laundry washers?
questions.explanation: Manjistha-devi and Rangaraga-devi are specified as the two daughters born to the couple who serve as Nanda Maharaja's laundry washers.

2.192.verse_text: Palindri-devi serves Srimati Radharani by dressing and decorating Her. Citrini decorates Radharani with various cosmetics. Mantriki-devi and Tantriki-devi are astrologers who reveal the future to Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which specific service is rendered by Palindri-devi to Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Palindri-devi is described as serving Srimati Radharani by dressing and decorating Her.

questions.question: Who is the gopi tasked with applying various cosmetics to decorate Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Citrini is identified as the gopi who decorates Srimati Radharani with various cosmetics.

questions.question: What is the primary role of the gopis named Mantriki-devi and Tantriki-devi in the service of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Mantriki-devi and Tantriki-devi are described as the astrologers who reveal the future to Srimati Radharani.

2.193.verse_text: Katyayani-devi is the leader of those gopi messengers who are older than Srimati Radharani. Bhagyavati-devi and Punyapunja-devi, the two daughters of Maharaja Nanda's sweeper, are also the maidservants of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Who serves as the leader of the gopi messengers who are older than Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Katyayani-devi is explicitly identified as the leader of the gopi messengers who are senior to Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which two maidservants of Srimati Radharani are the daughters of Maharaja Nanda's sweeper?
questions.explanation: Bhagyavati-devi and Punyapunja-devi are identified as the daughters of Maharaja Nanda's sweeper and serve as maidservants to Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: What is the occupation of the father of Bhagyavati-devi and Punyapunja-devi?
questions.explanation: Bhagyavati-devi and Punyapunja-devi are described as the daughters of the person who serves as the sweeper for Maharaja Nanda.

2.194.verse_text: Tunga-devi, Malli-devi and Matalli-devi are the leaders of those girls descended from the uncivilized mountain tribe known as the Pulindas. In Vrndavana some of the Pulinda girls act as the friends of Srimati Radharani and some are the friends of Sri Krsna.

questions.question: Who are the three girls identified as the leaders of those descended from the Pulinda mountain tribe?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly names Tunga-devi, Malli-devi, and Matalli-devi as the leaders of the girls belonging to the Pulinda mountain tribe.

questions.question: Which tribal group in Vrndavana counts Tunga-devi, Malli-devi, and Matalli-devi among its descendants?
questions.explanation: Tunga-devi, Malli-devi, and Matalli-devi are identified as leaders of the uncivilized mountain tribe known as the Pulindas.

questions.question: What is the social standing of the Pulinda girls residing in Vrndavana in relation to Srimati Radharani and Sri Krsna?
options: They act as friends of both Srimati Radharani and Sri Krsna
They serve only as personal maidservants to Srimati Radharani
They are exclusively the companions of Sri Krsna's cowherd friends
They serve as messengers exclusively for Srimati Radharani
questions.correct_answer: They act as friends of both Srimati Radharani and Sri Krsna
questions.explanation: The text states that in Vrndavana, some of the Pulinda girls serve as friends of Srimati Radharani, while others serve as friends of Sri Krsna.

2.195.verse_text: Also included among Srimati Radharani's servants are Gargi-devi and other very respectable brahmana girls, Bhrngarika-devi and other girls from the ceti community, Vijaya-devi, Rasala-devi, Payoda-devi and other girls from the vita community, as well as the boys Subala, Ujjvala, Gandharva, Madhumangala and Raktaka.

questions.question: Which of the following associates is specifically identified as being part of the community of respectable brahmana girls serving Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Gargi-devi is identified as one of the respectable brahmana girls among the servants of Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which personality is listed among the girls belonging to the ceti community who serve Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Bhrngarika-devi is explicitly mentioned as belonging to the ceti community of Srimati Radharani's servants.

questions.question: Who among the following belongs to the vita community of girls serving Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Vijaya-devi, along with Rasala-devi and Payoda-devi, is categorized within the vita community of girls serving Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which male associate is counted among the servants of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Ujjvala is included in the list of boys, alongside Subala, Gandharva, Madhumangala, and Raktaka, who serve Srimati Radharani.

questions.question: Which of the following is not mentioned as part of the group of boys serving Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Pisangi-devi is not among the boys listed as servants; the boys mentioned are Subala, Ujjvala, Gandharva, Madhumangala, and Raktaka.

2.196.verse_text: Tunga-devi, Pisangi-devi and Kalakandala-devi always remain near Srimati Radharani to serve Her. Manjual-devi, Bindula-devi, Sandha-devi, Mrdula-devi and others, although very young still engage in Radharani's service.

questions.question: Which three associates are described as always remaining near Srimati Radharani to serve Her?
questions.explanation: The verse explicitly identifies Tunga-devi, Pisangi-devi, and Kalakandala-devi as those who always remain near Radharani.

questions.question: Which gopis are mentioned as engaging in Srimati Radharani's service despite being very young?
questions.explanation: The verse lists Manjual-devi, Bindula-devi, Sandha-devi, and Mrdula-devi as gopis who serve Radharani despite their young age.

2.197.verse_text: Sunada, Yamuna and Bahula are the most important of Srimati Radharani's pet surabhi cows. Tungi is Her chubby pet calf, Kakkhati is Her old pet monkey, Rangini is Her pet doe and Carucnadrika is Her pet cakori bird.

questions.question: Which three cows are identified as the most important of Srimati Radharani's pet surabhi cows?
questions.explanation: Sunada, Yamuna and Bahula are explicitly stated to be the most important among Srimati Radharani's pet surabhi cows.

questions.question: Who is the chubby pet calf belonging to Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Tungi is identified as Srimati Radharani's chubby pet calf.

questions.question: What is the name of Srimati Radharani's old pet monkey?
questions.explanation: Kakkhati is described as Srimati Radharani's old pet monkey.

questions.question: Which animal is kept by Srimati Radharani as her pet doe?
questions.explanation: Rangini is designated as Srimati Radharani's pet doe.

questions.question: What is the name of Srimati Radharani's pet cakori bird?
questions.explanation: Carucnadrika is identified as the pet cakori bird of Srimati Radharani.

2.198.verse_text: Tundikeri is the name of Radharani's pet swan, who is fond of swimming in Radha-kunda. Madhuri is Radharani's pet elephant and Suksmadhi and Subha are Her two pet parrots.

questions.question: What is the name of Srimati Radharani's pet swan who enjoys swimming in the waters of Radha-kunda?
questions.explanation: Tundikeri is explicitly identified as the pet swan of Srimati Radharani with a fondness for Radha-kunda.

questions.question: Which of Srimati Radharani's pet animals is known as Madhuri?
questions.explanation: Madhuri is identified as the name of Srimati Radharani's pet elephant.

questions.question: What are the names of the two pet parrots belonging to Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Suksmadhi and Subha are the names specifically given for Srimati Radharani's two pet parrots.

2.199.verse_text: The two parrots perfectly imitate Lalita-devi's playful jokes spoken to her master and mistress (Sri Sri Radha-Krsna). By this wonderful repetition the parrots astonish the gopis.

questions.question: Which two pet parrots belonging to Srimati Radharani are famous for perfectly imitating the playful jokes Lalita-devi speaks to the Divine Couple?
questions.explanation: Suksmadhi and Subha are identified as the two pet parrots of Srimati Radharani who imitate Lalita-devi's jokes.

questions.question: Whose playful jokes, when repeated by the parrots Suksmadhi and Subha, astonish the assembly of gopis?
questions.explanation: The parrots Suksmadhi and Subha are noted for imitating the playful jokes spoken by Lalita-devi to Sri Sri Radha and Krishna.

2.200.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's Ornaments: Srimati Radharani's tilaka marking is named Smarayantra. Her jeweled necklace is named Harimohana, Her jeweled earrings are named Rocana and the pearl decorating Her nose is named Prabhakari.

questions.question: What is the specific name of Srimati Radharani's tilaka marking?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's tilaka marking is explicitly identified as Smarayantra.

questions.question: What is the name of the jeweled necklace worn by Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The jeweled necklace decorating Srimati Radharani is known as Harimohana.

questions.question: Which of Srimati Radharani's jeweled earrings is known by the name Rocana?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's jeweled earrings are called Rocana.

questions.question: What is the name of the pearl that adorns the nose of Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The pearl decorating Srimati Radharani's nose is specifically named Prabhakari.

2.201.verse_text: Her locket which contains a picture of Lord Krsna, is named Madana. Her Syamantaka jewel is also known as Sankhacuda-siromani (Sankhacuda's crest-jewel).

questions.question: What is the name of the locket worn by Srimati Radharani that contains a picture of Lord Krsna?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's locket containing a picture of Lord Krsna is explicitly identified as Madana.

questions.question: What is another name for the Syamantaka jewel worn by Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: The Syamantaka jewel worn by Srimati Radharani is known as Sankhacuda-siromani, meaning Sankhacuda's crest-jewel.

2.202.verse_text: The auspicious jewel She wears around Her neck is called Puspavan because it eclipses the simultaneous rising of the sun and moon (puspavan) with its splendor. Her anklets are called Catakarava because their tinkling sounds resemble the warbling of cataka birds. Her bracelets are called Manikarvura.

questions.question: What is the name of the auspicious jewel worn around the neck of Srimati Radharani that eclipses the simultaneous rising of the sun and moon?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani wears a jewel around Her neck named Puspavan, which is so radiant that it outshines both the sun and moon.

questions.question: Why is the jewel worn around the neck of Srimati Radharani specifically named Puspavan?
options: Because it is shaped like a cataka bird
Because its sound resembles a flower blooming
Because it eclipses the simultaneous rising of the sun and moon
Because it was gifted by King Vrsabhanu
questions.correct_answer: Because it eclipses the simultaneous rising of the sun and moon
questions.explanation: The name Puspavan is given to the jewel because its splendor eclipses the brilliance of both the sun and moon rising together.

questions.question: What is the name of the anklets worn by Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's anklets are named Catakarava because the tinkling sound they produce mimics the warbling of cataka birds.

questions.question: Which of Srimati Radharani's ornaments is noted for having a tinkling sound that resembles the warbling of cataka birds?
questions.explanation: The anklets of Srimati Radharani are known as Catakarava because of their specific tinkling sound.

questions.question: What is the name of Srimati Radharani's bracelets?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani wears bracelets that are specifically identified as Manikarvura.

2.203.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's signet ring is named Vipaksamardini. Her sash is named Kancanacitrangi and Her ankle-bells, which stun Lord Krsna with their tinkling sounds, are named Ratnagopura.

questions.question: What is the name of Srimati Radharani's signet ring?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's signet ring is explicitly identified as Vipaksamardini.

questions.question: Which ornament of Srimati Radharani is known as Kancanacitrangi?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's sash is named Kancanacitrangi.

questions.question: What is the name of Srimati Radharani's ankle-bells that stun Lord Krsna with their tinkling sounds?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's ankle-bells, which have the power to stun Lord Krsna with their sound, are named Ratnagopura.

2.204.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's garments are named Meghambara. Her upper garment is red like a ruby and it is the favorite of Lord Hari. Radharani's lower garment is the color of a blue cloud and it is Her own favorite.

questions.question: What is the specific name given to the garments worn by Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's garments are specifically named Meghambara.

questions.question: What is the color of the upper garment worn by Srimati Radharani, which is notably dear to Lord Hari?
questions.explanation: Radharani's upper garment is described as being red like a ruby, a color that is the favorite of Lord Hari.

questions.question: What is the color of Srimati Radharani's lower garment, which is described as being her own personal favorite?
options: The color of a blue cloud
The color of a peacock feather
The color of a lotus petal
questions.correct_answer: The color of a blue cloud
questions.explanation: The lower garment of Srimati Radharani is described as having the color of a blue cloud, which she prefers.

2.205.verse_text: Srimati Radhrani's jeweled mirror is named Sudhamsudarpaharana, which means "that which removes (harana) the moon's (sudhamsu) pride (darpa)."

questions.question: What is the name given to the jeweled mirror belonging to Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's jeweled mirror is specifically named Sudhamsudarpaharana.

questions.question: What is the literal meaning of the name of Srimati Radharani's mirror, Sudhamsudarpaharana?
options: That which steals the heart of the lover
That which removes the pride of the moon
That which creates a playful forest
questions.correct_answer: That which removes the pride of the moon
questions.explanation: The name Sudhamsudarpaharana is derived from sudhamsu (the moon), darpa (pride), and harana (that which removes).

2.206.verse_text: Her golden stick for applying mascara is named Narmada, Her jeweled comb is named Svastida and Her private flower garden is named Kandarpakuhali.

questions.question: What is the name of the golden stick used by Srimati Radharani for applying mascara?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's golden stick for applying mascara is named Narmada.

questions.question: Which of Srimati Radharani's personal items is known by the name Svastida?
questions.explanation: The jeweled comb belonging to Srimati Radharani is named Svastida.

questions.question: What is the name of the private flower garden belonging to Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's private flower garden is designated as Kandarpakuhali.

2.207.verse_text: In Radharani's garden is a vine of golden jasmine flowers that She has named Tadidvalli ("the vine of lightning"). Her private lake bears Her own name (Radha-kunda) and on the shore of that lake is a kadamba tree that is the site of very confidential talks between Her and Lord Krsna.

questions.question: What is the specific name given by Srimati Radharani to the vine of golden jasmine flowers found in Her garden?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani named the golden jasmine vine in Her garden Tadidvalli, which translates to 'the vine of lightning'.

questions.question: What is the name of Srimati Radharani's private lake?
questions.explanation: The verse states that Srimati Radharani's private lake bears Her own name, Radha-kunda.

questions.question: Which specific type of tree grows on the shore of Radha-kunda and serves as the venue for the most confidential talks between Srimati Radharani and Lord Krsna?
questions.explanation: A kadamba tree is situated on the shore of Radha-kunda, which is described as the site for the confidential discussions between the Divine Couple.

2.208.verse_text: Her favorite ragas are mallara and dhanasri and Her favorite dances are chalikya and rudravallaki.

questions.question: Which two musical ragas are most favored by Srimati Radharani?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's favorite ragas are explicitly identified as mallara and dhanasri.

questions.question: What are the names of the two dances that Srimati Radharani most enjoys performing?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's favorite dances are specifically noted as chalikya and rudravallaki.

2.209.verse_text: Srimati Radharani's glorious birth occurred on the eighth day of the bright moon in the month of Bhadra. Although generally not full on that day, the moon appeared full to celebrate Radharani's appearance in this world.

questions.question: On which lunar day of the bright moon did Srimati Radharani's glorious appearance occur?
questions.explanation: Srimati Radharani's appearance is explicitly stated to have occurred on the eighth day of the bright moon in the month of Bhadra.

questions.question: In which month did the appearance of Srimati Radharani take place?
questions.explanation: The appearance of Srimati Radharani is documented to have happened during the month of Bhadra.

questions.question: What miracle occurred regarding the moon on the day Srimati Radharani appeared in this world?
options: The moon became invisible out of respect
The moon appeared full despite it not being the full moon day
The moon shed tears of nectar
The moon stayed in the sky for three consecutive days
questions.correct_answer: The moon appeared full despite it not being the full moon day
questions.explanation: Although generally not full on the eighth day, the moon appeared full to celebrate Radharani's appearance.

2.210.verse_text: In this way we have revealed a little about the countless associates of Sri Sri Radha and Krsna, the two monarchs of Sri Vrndavana.
